query: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_messages_phone_ts ON messages (phoneNumber, smsTimestamp DESC); CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_messages_device_phone ON messages (deviceId, phoneNumber); CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_messages_ts ON messages (smsTimestamp DESC);
